headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -91.0)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 67% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 125 quotes and an overwhelming 99 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction.
• Optimism crashed to its lowest point in nearly 4 months at -59.0, showing widespread negativity.
• Fears also declined further from yesterday's already low levels, suggesting mounting concerns across multiple areas.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
